ValidationRule.description: Only the assigned Project Manager may advance from client-approval submission directly to Developer Assigned.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Submission_Status__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Project_Manager__c)), TEXT(Submission_Status__c) = "Developer Assigned to Pending", TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Submission_Status__c)) = "Project Manager Submits for Client Approval", $User.ContactId <> Project_Manager__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only the Project Manager on this task may skip client backlog approval by setting submission status to Developer Assigned to Pending.
